title: blepharis squarrosa
intro: Blepharis squarrosa, also known as the square-stemmed blepharis or square-stemmed eye-bright, is a plant species in the family Acanthaceae. This plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Blepharis squarrosa include reducing inflammation and improving respiratory issues, making it a potential remedy for conditions such as bronchitis and asthma. The plant is typically prepared as a tea or infusion by steeping the leaves in hot water, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
